blocks.text: Record-breaking cricket news: 'Excellent' Archer takes quick wickets to give England control. Jofra Archer takes back-to-back wickets to remove Axar Patel and Shivam Dube, but falls just short of a hat-trick as India slip to 193-7 against England during the second one-day international in Card

Jofra Archer takes back-to-back wickets to remove Axar Patel and Shivam Dube, but falls just short of a hat-trick as India slip to 193-7 against England during the second one-day international in Cardiff.
